title: 晶格推进
scene: 等距晶格、斜切模块与精密节点构成理性而有推进感的几何画面。
prompt: Create one premium vertical wallpaper for category 抽象 / 几何. A refined geometric abstraction made of isometric lattices, sliced modules, precise connectors, and subtle depth. No faces, no hands, no visible text, no watermark, no logo, no border.
author: OpenAI Codex
